description: Useful external links per game (ProtonDB, PCGamingWiki, Reddit, etc)

schema.url: str — Full URL to the resource
schema.source: str — One of: protondb | pcgamingwiki | reddit | github
schema.link_type: str — One of: fix | guide | discussion | wiki | video

source_values.github: GitHub issues, PRs, or repos with fixes

link_type_values.fix: Direct fix or workaround for a specific issue
link_type_values.guide: Step-by-step guide for setup or optimization
